rankings.reason: Excellent focus on high-tech automation and personalized convenience, perfectly aligning with the futuristic, innovative airport vision.
Strong emphasis on mobility and automated services, though the description feels slightly less cohesive than Option A.
Provides a good narrative, but focuses too heavily on basic language translation rather than truly futuristic innovation.
Fails to meet the futuristic criteria, describing a stressful, traditional airport experience instead of an innovative one.
